title: Optimised Engineering
description: Simple modpack based primarily on Immersive Engineering as well as Optimized Forge 1.19 by "bruh". Really slim lightweight Vanilla+ modpack
body:
Note: Make sure to add "datapacks" folder to your world after creating your world! Note: I am not updating this modpack! Feel free to update the mods through Prism Launcher though Make sure to backups your worlds manually as well once in a blue moon, Simple Backups corrupted my world once (Out of about 8-10 restores) Quark Engineering mod created by rickiegamer can be found here: https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/quark-engineering Simple modpack based primarily on Immersive Engineering as well as Optimized Forge 1.19 by "bruh". Really slim lightweight Vanilla+ modpack. Aether Legacy wil be added when they backport it to 1.19.2

Includes:

  • Appleskin
  • Gravestone mod
  • JEI
  • Waystones/Waymaker
  • Storage Drawers
  • Xaero's Minimap

Many QoL improvements and performance mods based on the Optimized Forge 1.19 modpack.

You might want to add Twilight Forest for some extra stuff to do Additional Changes/Features: -Experience drops for smelting/blasting IE grit! -Fusz_'s Easy Anvils, Easy Magic (Reroll Enchantments), Trading Post, Completionist's Index & Enchantment Infuser Mod (Repairing disabled) -Quark + Quark Copper pipe added and configured for a cohesive experience -Added a balanced recipe for coke coal creation from the Arc Furnace -Ore doubling for Immersive Engineering re-introduced as per pre-1.17: https://modrinth.com/datapack/immersive-engineering-ore-doubling -Automatically spawn with an IE Guide - Waystones + Xaero's Compat - Super fast! Optimised for low-end computers thanks to the Optimised Forge modpack and mod creators , if you have a higher-end computer make sure to configure the Quality and Performance Tabs in the Video Settings - Faithful x32/Quark32x included: https://faithfulpack.net/ / Note: f32.me (Faithful modded) NOT included If you want to make a server, just remove/disable the following mods from the server mods folder: Textrue's Rubudium Options Rubidium Rubidium Extra Oculus Dynamic Lights Reforged Distant Horizons Enjoy! And pls give advice for how I can improve it, Thanks 42years.1764days@gmail.com
